category_title: High-risk students with chronic truancy and complex emotional/behavioral needs
scenario_title: Personal futures planning and alternative credit activities
minimal_context: The student and tutor are sitting together to develop a written action plan for alternative credit activities like internships.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's work on your written action plan to figure out some alternative activities to help you obtain credits, like an internship or independent study.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don't see the point of writing any of this down. I'm already significantly behind in credits and totally off track to graduate.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What kind of work-based learning experience do you think you might like to try?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don't know. Thinking about school and graduation just gives me a lot of stress and anxiety. I don't really want to work with any mentors or adults right now.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We just need to write down at least one goal for your plan today.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Stands up from the desk) I'm not doing this, I'm just going to leave. I already have five unexcused absences this quarter anyway, so it doesn't even matter.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Let's work on your written action plan to figure out some alternative activities to help you obtain credits, like an internship or independent study.

STUDENT: I don't see the point of writing any of this down. I'm already significantly behind in credits and totally off track to graduate.

TUTOR: What kind of work-based learning experience do you think you might like to try?

STUDENT: I don't know. Thinking about school and graduation just gives me a lot of stress and anxiety. I don't really want to work with any mentors or adults right now.

TUTOR: We just need to write down at least one goal for your plan today.

STUDENT: (Stands up from the desk) I'm not doing this, I'm just going to leave. I already have five unexcused absences this quarter anyway, so it doesn't even matter.

task.content: Develop written action plans targeting goals identified by the youth and individualized alternative activities to obtain credits, including community- and work-based learning experiences, independent study, and internships

context.social_setting: Individualized team development and workplace or career-related mentoring

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: Being off track to graduate due to being significantly behind in credits
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Exhibited chronic discipline or truancy issues, and a high absenteeism rate reflected by five or more unexcused absences in a quarter
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Cognitive impairments related to stress and anxiety

behavior_patterns.condition: When experiencing difficulty forming positive relationships with peers and adults
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Greater likelihood to be disengaged from school, disproportionally high rates of school discipline referrals, and high placement rates in alternative classrooms and schools
